event_short: Scaphoideus titanus (FD vector) first found in Hungary on yellow sticky traps in Bács-Kiskun, Somogy and Zala counties
notes: EPPO Reporting Service Article 265 - first record of S. titanus in Hungary; survey 2006.

event_short: First Hungarian Flavescence dorée detection: end of August 2013 in Lenti and Kerkateskánd (Zala county) in a household vineyard near the Slovenian border
notes: EPPO Reporting Service Article 2673. Detected in vector and asymptomatic plants; 1 km demarcated zone established. Slovenian cross-border spread suspected.

event_short: Hungary submits IPPC pest report on FD phytoplasma; ongoing surveillance and demarcated zones in Zala area
notes: IPPC pest report from Hungary, September 2018.

event_short: NÉBIH confirms FD in Pannonhalma wine region (Kajárpéc and Győrszemere, Győr-Moson-Sopron county) on 18 October 2025
notes: Trademagazin reporting on NÉBIH announcement, October 2025.

event_short: FD confirmed in the Tokaj wine region for the first time, including the historic Tokaj UNESCO World Heritage area
notes: Tokaj detection considered the most consequential single find of 2025; widely covered in international wine press.

event_short: FD confirmed in the Somló wine region
notes: Trademagazin: 'spreading: now reached the Somló wine region'.

event_short: FD confirmed in the Villány wine region; NÉBIH calls for intensified vector control
notes: Trademagazin reporting on NÉBIH Villány announcement.

event_short: NÉBIH confirms Flavescence dorée in 21 of 22 Hungarian wine districts; over 200 inspection teams surveyed 8,691 hectares in autumn 2025
notes: Headline 2025 event. The single unaffected district was not specifically named in any source consulted; left unspecified rather than guessed.

event_short: Hungarian government allocates 3.8 billion HUF (~USD 11M) for emergency inspections, mandatory pesticide programmes and grower compensation
notes: Aid package covers vector control, surveillance, and uprooting compensation. Confirmed by multiple international sources (Vinetur, The Grape Reset, Wine-Searcher, wein.plus).

event_short: Mandatory uprooting of symptomatic vines and prophylactic insecticide sprays against Scaphoideus titanus enforced nationwide; drones and mobile diagnostic units deployed
notes: Affected growers face vineyard losses; replanting restrictions in quarantine zones.
